title: Bone Meal Small Flowers
description: This adds small bone meal that lets to bonemeal small flowers (and saplings) to create a duplicate.
body:
Adds Small Bone Meal which duplicates small flowers (except Torchflower and Wither Rose) and also saplings, like one could do with normal Bone Meal on large flowers.

I will only offer 1.21.10 since this isn't something I'm looking to spend tons of time on!
